title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Jesus Burgess, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13 as rebecca’s past, the Toy Soldier, and the Riku family tragedy deepen the emotional stakes behind the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s rebellion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He hung up! And after such a ridiculous request!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Did he not exchange case: Sar-san!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What a one-sided con- version! He didn't listen to us at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fuffuffu just hurry up and hand over Caesar's heart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: there's no meaning in dragging this out any further...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: gone after the bait I've set.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: At this very moment, he's fighting in the Tourna- went at the colosseum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's a death match between the strongest outlaws, who've come from far and wide

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If he loses, it'll be a quick trip to hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's no way he's emerging from that Col- OSSeum alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Go go go go go go go go go! Luffy-Dono!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Quit it with that cheering, already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But Sanji-Dono, a man must be cheered for if he is to win!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: This is looking like an interesting fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Just who is that little guy!?

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
